general_provisions: This bill modifies the private cause of action for the payment of wages.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>enacts a two-year statute of limitations for a lawsuit against an employer under the Utah Payment of Wages Act; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
last_action_owner: Senate file for bills not passed
